$comment: BuildReport for the curated static Support Inbox example. Built 2026-07-14 with per-conversation message threads, guarded reply that reopens and claims the conversation, assign/snooze/close/reopen lifecycle, a New conversation Dialog, list/grid views, and localStorage persistence with a Reset inbox action — meeting the app-suite CRUD/persistence/guard bar rather than a UI mock.

checkFailures.name: storybook
checkFailures.detail: build-storybook failed on Linux because the committed staticDirs entry used a Windows path separator ("..\\public"), which does not resolve as a POSIX directory. Fixed by using the portable Storybook convention ("../public"), which is also valid on Windows. Unrelated to the Support Inbox example itself.
